TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ci yang-cen-nin dubelidan nida a cudad namakayni i calaycay pabi huean: yddatu kaku maluayaw tisuwan ŤáīŚłÜ:śąĎŚĹíŚ§Ą,šĹ†ŚČćŤ∑Į nu maku siyaw-huwanśąĎÁöĄŚįŹŚłÜ: makaadih kisu tina cudad sa , miliyas tu kaku tuyni kalecafan nita a cikiw tanguu'l kaku , taydan i cayay kasausi nu sasausian katukuh i hadahadauc . . mana kalalum kisu , nikaladayan nita tu tusep a kanihalan nu cilal kaceleman nu cilal , wiydasa nipalemed nu paudipay takuwan u sakapahay a dinubu , inalemed , taneng tu malakuwit ku sapiliyas . . madateng henay i 1995 a mihcaan sayaway ita masasuadih i san-tu , ,u miwanayay kisu a micudaday ; 2004 a mihca muliyaw aca kita masasuadih , ,alaw han u madatataynasy tu kisu u sakapahay a sakalaluungan maudip . .yu itida henay i cin-huwa-yin "kitidaan", a nikaudip , ťā£šļõŚĻīŚú®śłÖŚćéŚõ≠"ŚĹíś†ĻŚĪÖ" ÁöĄśó•Ś≠ź,ya i lilingay nipacait a sasing atu niculilan nita . ,u nisakabi nu misu pina tu kusienae nu labi , ,itida kaku i sidian micaliw tu nikalikat nu dingki miadih tu sinbuen matalaw mapacekul kisu nu suni , ,alaw han mala sadikuday tu nika udip aku u salikatay a bunac . . hinasakamu kisu u satamelacay ku nipabi isu takuwan tu kitakit . ,nika caay katineng kisu , wiysu kyami ku miadihay pakatineng takuwan u babalaki a hatida tu sa , ,muliyaw maka lusipsep a mihcaan idaw henay kaku , ,wiysu kyami misasining pakakapah tu nikaudip a pakatanayu' tu damsay nu misu . . maseneng kaku tu nikabalaki nu misu , .adih han naku miliyas kisu tu nikatakelal nu ngangan nu maku .ÁúčÁĚÄšĹ†ťĀŅŚľÄśąĎÁöĄŚÖČÁéĮ,kasenun sa kisu micumud i 16 a siki nu u-cu misangaay tu luma' a mikingkiw, , namakayni i cin-huwa pu-se a tahekal "awliaelun patideng" ",itini nu taygaku u icelangay u kasenengan kakasikadan , matineng kaku yu mahida henay idaw tu ku Kya kamu ni ulhu " nu udip a kitidaan" .u mahiniay u cayay pacangday u mapacekilay atu icelang , ,u yadahay a nipasakapah nu taw madama kaku .mahida nipabi ita tu nabalucu'an i cin-huwa, ,wiyni sa nabalucu'an nu misu a maudip nipatucekan , šĹ†ŚĮĻÁĒüśīĽ ÁöĄťÄöťÄŹťÄČśč©,ayda sa malucek tu namin caay kaw cima ku niidaan nu misu , ,wiysu sa u masa cacayay a ung-huean .yu mahida henay namusakamu tu kaku tisuwan šĽéŚČćśąĎšĺŅšłéšĹ†ŤĮī,anu mahica i nayay tu kaku , kasiacawa tu .u cayay kuy ni kakasikadan balaki tu matineng kaku nayi ku watan nu nikaudip ŤŅôšłćśėĮŚģĘŚ•ó‚ÄĒ ,anu icuwa Nuka udip kasicabay tu nika anu waka henay kaku ,ŚŹĮŚĻīÁļ™ŤĹĽÁöĄśąĎ,u sakaydihan aku u kitakit nu misu haynika a dauc idaw ku naemekan nu maku .nika tengilen ku kamuwaku šĹÜŤĮ∑šĹ†Śź¨śąĎŤĮī,amana kacalilaw nu cancanan a kawaw , ,mahida ni pacabay nu misu takuwan hatida tu ku paini nu paudipay ,mahida sa sakapah han maudip ,miadih tu cayay henay pacabayi nu maku a adihan . .u sapasubana' pakatineng takuwan tu adauc mazazunbang tu ku culil , ,wiysu han tu sa pakatineng takuwan ,ŤÄĆšĹ†Ťģ©śąĎśáā Śĺó,wiydih hananay malakuwiyt ku kahemekan .namudaang tu kaku tu tauc nu tabaki ,śąĎśõĺšĽįŤßāŚģáŚģôšĻčŚ§ß,ayda han tu sa u udip malalala' tu , Ś¶āšĽäšŅĮŤļęŚĹíšļéŚįėŚúü,u sakadatengan aku sa wiysu , ŚĒĮšłÄÁöĄÁČĶśĆāśėĮšĹ†,u sakasadep nu balucu' aku sa wiysu tu ŚĒĮšłÄÁöĄŚģČŚŅÉšĻüśėĮšĹ†‚ÄĒmatineng kaku , matabal matineng tu kaku idaw tu ku sapalikat nu misu tu icelang atu dadan . .mana' padateng , taayaw han muculil.ŚąęŚŅĶ,ŚźĎŚČćŤĶį. kamuwaku: nu mahicaay tu ku mahiniay a nikasasukaydih kya hatini tu ku balucu' anu idaw ku muyhiniay takuwan hacica sa ku namuh aku , hangi hidaw haw tiya satu nikaliyaw aca maudip cu ci cu piinal tu mahiniay a kalacawa hang idaw sakapah han tu ku udip anu idaw ku maydihay saicelang han maydih hacica tu demiad a maudip hidaw haw .amana katanguul maudip .
S.PHON: ¶i jaŇč- ¶…ôn-nin dub…ôr~…ĺidan nida a ¶udad namakajni i ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj pabi ńßu…ôan: jddatu kaku mar~…ĺuajaw tisuwan **:***,*** nu maku sijaw-ńßuwan****: makaadińß kisu tina ¶udad sa , mir~…ĺijas tu kaku tujni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶afan nita a ¶ikiw taŇčuu Ē~ °r~…ĺ kaku , tajdan i ¶ajaj kasausi nu sasausian katukuńß i ńßadańßadau ¶ . . mana kar~…ĺar~…ĺum kisu , nikar~…ĺadajan nita tu tus…ôp a kanińßar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ , wijdasa nipar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd nu paudipaj takuwan u sakapańßaj a dinubu , inar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd , tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺakuwit ku sapir~…ĺijas . . madat…ôŇč ńß…ônaj i **** a mińß ¶aan sajawaj ita masasuadińß i san-tu , ,u miwanajaj kisu a mi ¶udadaj ; **** a mińß ¶a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a kita masasuadińß , ,ar~…ĺaw ńßan u madatatajnasj tu kisu u sakapańßaj a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuuŇčan maudip . .ju itida ńß…ônaj i ¶in-ńßuwa-jin "kitidaan", a nikaudip , *******"***" ***,ja i r~…ĺir~…ĺiŇčaj nipa ¶ait a sasiŇč atu ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nita . ,u nisakabi nu misu pina tu kusi…ôna…ô nu r~…ĺabi , ,itida kaku i sidian mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu nikar~…ĺikat nu diŇčki miadińß tu sinbu…ôn matar~…ĺaw mapa ¶…ôkur~…ĺ kisu nu suni , ,ar~…ĺaw ńßan mar~…ĺa sadikudaj tu nika udip aku u sar~…ĺikataj a buna ¶ . . ńßinasakamu kisu u satam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku nipabi isu takuwan tu kitakit . ,nika ¶aaj katin…ôŇč kisu , wijsu kjami ku miadińßaj pakatin…ôŇč takuwan u babar~…ĺaki a ńßatida tu sa , ,mur~…ĺijaw maka r~…ĺusips…ôp a mińß ¶aan idaw ńß…ônaj kaku , ,wijsu kjami misasiniŇč pakakapańß tu nikaudip a pakatanaju Ē~ ° tu damsaj nu misu . . mas…ôn…ôŇč kaku tu nikabar~…ĺaki nu misu , .adińß ńßan naku mir~…ĺijas kisu tu nikatak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu ŇčaŇčan nu maku .*********,kas…ônun sa kisu mi ¶umud i ** a siki nu u- ¶u misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a mikiŇčkiw, , namakajni i ¶in-ńßuwa pu-s…ô a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ "awr~…ĺia…ôr~…ĺun patid…ôŇč" ",itini nu tajgaku u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u kas…ôn…ôŇčan kakasikadan , matin…ôŇč kaku ju mańßida ńß…ônaj idaw tu ku kja kamu ni ur~…ĺńßu " nu udip a kitidaan" .u mańßiniaj u ¶ajaj pa ¶aŇčdaj u mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč , ,u jadańßaj a nipasakapańß nu taw madama kaku .mańßida nipabi ita tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an i ¶in-ńßuwa, ,wijni sa nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an nu misu a maudip nipatu ¶…ôkan , **** *****,ajda sa mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu namin ¶aaj kaw ¶ima ku niidaan nu misu , ,wijsu sa u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a uŇč-ńßu…ôan .ju mańßida ńß…ônaj namusakamu tu kaku tisuwan *******,anu mańßi ¶a i najaj tu kaku , kasia ¶awa tu .u ¶ajaj kuj ni kakasikadan bar~…ĺaki tu matin…ôŇč kaku naji ku watan nu nikaudip ****** ,anu i ¶uwa nuka udip kasi ¶abaj tu nika anu waka ńß…ônaj kaku ,******,u sakajdińßan aku u kitakit nu misu ńßajnika a dau ¶ idaw ku na…ôm…ôkan nu maku .nika t…ôŇčir~…ĺ…ôn ku kamuwaku ******,amana ka ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw nu ¶an ¶anan a kawaw , ,mańßida ni pa ¶abaj nu misu takuwan ńßatida tu ku paini nu paudipaj ,mańßida sa sakapańß ńßan maudip ,miadińß tu ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj pa ¶abaji nu maku a adińßan . .u sapasubana Ē~ ° pakatin…ôŇč takuwan tu adau ¶ mazazunbaŇč tu ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ , ,wijsu ńßan tu sa pakatin…ôŇč takuwan ,***** *,wijdińß ńßananaj mar~…ĺakuwijt ku kańß…ôm…ôkan .namudaaŇč tu kaku tu tau ¶ nu tabaki ,********,ajda ńßan tu sa u udip mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu , ********,u sakadat…ôŇčan aku sa wijsu , *******,u sakasad…ôp nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° aku sa wijsu tu *********matin…ôŇč kaku , matabar~…ĺ matin…ôŇč tu kaku idaw tu ku sapar~…ĺikat nu misu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu dadan . .mana Ē~ ° padat…ôŇč , taajaw ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.**,***. kamuwaku: nu mańßi ¶aaj tu ku mańßiniaj a nikasasukajdińß kja ńßatini tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° anu idaw ku mujńßiniaj takuwan ńßa ¶i ¶a sa ku namuńß aku , ńßaŇči ńßidaw ńßaw tija satu nikar~…ĺijaw a ¶a maudip ¶u ¶i ¶u piinar~…ĺ tu mańßiniaj a kar~…ĺa ¶awa ńßaŇč idaw sakapańß ńßan tu ku udip anu idaw ku majdińßaj sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan majdińß ńßa ¶i ¶a tu d…ômiad a maudip ńßidaw ńßaw .amana kataŇčuur~…ĺ maudip .

miliyas tu kaku tuyni kalecafan nita a cikiw tanguu'l kaku , taydan i cayay kasausi nu sasausian katukuh i hadahadauc . . mana kalalum kisu , nikaladayan nita tu tusep a kanihalan nu cilal kaceleman nu cilal , wiydasa nipalemed nu paudipay takuwan u sakapahay a dinubu , inalemed , taneng tu malakuwit ku sapiliyas . . madateng henay i 1995 a mihcaan sayaway ita masasuadih i san-tu , ,u miwanayay kisu a micudaday ; 2004 a mihca muliyaw aca kita masasuadih , ,alaw han u madatataynasy tu kisu u sakapahay a sakalaluungan maudip . .yu itida henay i cin-huwa-yin "kitidaan", a nikaudip , ťā£šļõŚĻīŚú®śłÖŚćéŚõ≠"ŚĹíś†ĻŚĪÖ" ÁöĄśó•Ś≠ź,ya i lilingay nipacait a sasing atu niculilan nita . ,u nisakabi nu misu pina tu kusienae nu labi , ,itida kaku i sidian micaliw tu nikalikat nu dingki miadih tu sinbuen matalaw mapacekul kisu nu suni , ,alaw han mala sadikuday tu nika udip aku u salikatay a bunac . . hinasakamu kisu u satamelacay ku nipabi isu takuwan tu kitakit . ,nika caay misangaay tu luma' a mikingkiw, , namakayni i cin-huwa pu-se a tahekal "awliaelun patideng" ",itini nu taygaku u icelangay u kasenengan kakasikadan , matineng kaku yu mahida henay idaw tu ku Kya kamu šĽéŚČćśąĎšĺŅšłéšĹ†ŤĮī,anu mahica i nayay tu kaku , kasiacawa tu .u cayay kuy ni kakasikadan balaki tu matineng kaku nayi ku watan nu nikaudip ŤŅôšłćśėĮŚģĘŚ•ó‚ÄĒ ,anu icuwa Nuka udip kasicabay tu nika ,mahida ni pacabay nu misu takuwan hatida tu ku paini nu paudipay ,mahida sa sakapah han maudip ,miadih tu cayay henay pacabayi nu maku a adihan . .u sapasubana' pakatineng takuwan tu adauc kaku idaw tu ku sapalikat nu misu tu icelang atu dadan . .mana' padateng , taayaw han muculil.ŚąęŚŅĶ,ŚźĎŚČćŤĶį. kamuwaku: nu mahicaay tu ku mahiniay a nikasasukaydih kya hatini tu ku balucu' anu idaw maydih hacica tu demiad a maudip hidaw haw .amana katanguul maudip .
S.PHON: ¶i jaŇč- ¶…ôn-nin dub…ôr~…ĺidan nida a ¶udad namakajni i ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj pabi ńßu…ôan: jddatu kaku mar~…ĺuajaw tisuwan **:***,*** nu maku sijaw-ńßuwan****: makaadińß kisu tina ¶udad sa , mir~…ĺijas tu kaku tujni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶afan nita a ¶ikiw taŇčuu Ē~ °r~…ĺ kaku , tajdan i ¶ajaj kasausi nu sasausian katukuńß i ńßadańßadau ¶ . . mana kar~…ĺar~…ĺum kisu , nikar~…ĺadajan nita tu tus…ôp a kanińßar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ , wijdasa nipar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd nu paudipaj takuwan u sakapańßaj a dinubu , inar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd , tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺakuwit ku sapir~…ĺijas . . madat…ôŇč ńß…ônaj i **** a mińß ¶aan sajawaj ita masasuadińß i san-tu , ,u miwanajaj kisu a mi ¶udadaj ; **** a mińß ¶a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a kita masasuadińß , ,ar~…ĺaw ńßan u madatatajnasj tu kisu u sakapańßaj a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuuŇčan maudip . .ju itida ńß…ônaj i ¶in-ńßuwa-jin "kitidaan", a nikaudip , *******"***" ***,ja i r~…ĺir~…ĺiŇčaj nipa ¶ait a sasiŇč atu ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nita . ,u nisakabi nu misu pina tu kusi…ôna…ô nu r~…ĺabi , ,itida kaku i sidian mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu nikar~…ĺikat nu diŇčki miadińß tu sinbu…ôn matar~…ĺaw mapa ¶…ôkur~…ĺ kisu nu suni , ,ar~…ĺaw ńßan mar~…ĺa sadikudaj tu nika udip aku u sar~…ĺikataj a buna ¶ . . ńßinasakamu kisu u satam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku nipabi isu takuwan tu kitakit . ,nika ¶aaj katin…ôŇč kisu , wijsu kjami ku miadińßaj pakatin…ôŇč takuwan u babar~…ĺaki a ńßatida tu sa , ,mur~…ĺijaw maka r~…ĺusips…ôp a mińß ¶aan idaw ńß…ônaj kaku , ,wijsu kjami misasiniŇč pakakapańß tu nikaudip a pakatanaju Ē~ ° tu damsaj nu misu . . mas…ôn…ôŇč kaku tu nikabar~…ĺaki nu misu , .adińß ńßan naku mir~…ĺijas kisu tu nikatak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu ŇčaŇčan nu maku .*********,kas…ônun sa kisu mi ¶umud i ** a siki nu u- ¶u misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a mikiŇčkiw, , namakajni i ¶in-ńßuwa pu-s…ô a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ "awr~…ĺia…ôr~…ĺun patid…ôŇč" ",itini nu tajgaku u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u kas…ôn…ôŇčan kakasikadan , matin…ôŇč kaku ju mańßida ńß…ônaj idaw tu ku kja kamu ni ur~…ĺńßu " nu udip a kitidaan" .u mańßiniaj u ¶ajaj pa ¶aŇčdaj u mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč , ,u jadańßaj a nipasakapańß nu taw madama kaku .mańßida nipabi ita tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an i ¶in-ńßuwa, ,wijni sa nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an nu misu a maudip nipatu ¶…ôkan , **** *****,ajda sa mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu namin ¶aaj kaw ¶ima ku niidaan nu misu , ,wijsu sa u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a uŇč-ńßu…ôan .ju mańßida ńß…ônaj namusakamu tu kaku tisuwan *******,anu mańßi ¶a i najaj tu kaku , kasia ¶awa tu .u ¶ajaj kuj ni kakasikadan bar~…ĺaki tu matin…ôŇč kaku naji ku watan nu nikaudip ****** ,anu i ¶uwa nuka udip kasi ¶abaj tu nika anu waka ńß…ônaj kaku ,******,u sakajdińßan aku u kitakit nu misu ńßajnika a dau ¶ idaw ku na…ôm…ôkan nu maku .nika t…ôŇčir~…ĺ…ôn ku kamuwaku ******,amana ka ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw nu ¶an ¶anan a kawaw , ,mańßida ni pa ¶abaj nu misu takuwan ńßatida tu ku paini nu paudipaj ,mańßida sa sakapańß ńßan maudip ,miadińß tu ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj pa ¶abaji nu maku a adińßan . .u sapasubana Ē~ ° pakatin…ôŇč takuwan tu adau ¶ mazazunbaŇč tu ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ , ,wijsu ńßan tu sa pakatin…ôŇč takuwan ,***** *,wijdińß ńßananaj mar~…ĺakuwijt ku kańß…ôm…ôkan .namudaaŇč tu kaku tu tau ¶ nu tabaki ,********,ajda ńßan tu sa u udip mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu , ********,u sakadat…ôŇčan aku sa wijsu , *******,u sakasad…ôp nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° aku sa wijsu tu *********matin…ôŇč kaku , matabar~…ĺ matin…ôŇč tu kaku idaw tu ku sapar~…ĺikat nu misu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu dadan . .mana Ē~ ° padat…ôŇč , taajaw ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.**,***. kamuwaku: nu mańßi ¶aaj tu ku mańßiniaj a nikasasukajdińß kja ńßatini tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° anu idaw ku mujńßiniaj takuwan ńßa ¶i ¶a sa ku namuńß aku , ńßaŇči ńßidaw ńßaw tija satu nikar~…ĺijaw a ¶a maudip ¶u ¶i ¶u piinar~…ĺ tu mańßiniaj a kar~…ĺa ¶awa ńßaŇč idaw sakapańß ńßan tu ku udip anu idaw ku majdińßaj sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan majdińß ńßa ¶i ¶a tu d…ômiad a maudip ńßidaw ńßaw .amana kataŇčuur~…ĺ maudip .
